---
title: "QGIS Plugin"
description: "A custom PyQGIS plugin automating multi-criteria spatial analysis workflows."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [Python, QGIS, PyQGIS]
---

## About

A QGIS plugin built with PyQGIS that automates a multi-step spatial analysis workflow — reducing manual processing time and making complex GIS operations accessible through a simple GUI. Designed for reproducible, script-driven results inside QGIS.

## Stack

[Python]{.badge-skill} [PyQGIS]{.badge-skill} [QGIS]{.badge-skill} [GIS]{.badge-skill}
